item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
impressive
more than one?
again
looks good
indeed
real talk
i have been in hiding
dang that's a beast
still like it every now and then
yes
just some C&C humor
i have to agree w Harold.. BFG is a great book
when you need to roll 5 blunts
maryland and DC don't know how to party?
mmm hmm
wait what
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Match mine
item.description: Match mine, please. Every time I buy a kilo of pet food, you will also buy a kilo of pet food and donate it to your chosen shelter if you want.

item.title: I spent 2 months growing this copper sulfate crystal
item.description: Started growing these in high school chemistry class and never stopped. Recipe: https://crystalverse.com/best-way-to-grow-copper-sulfate-crystals/ Heisenberg would be proud. Then again, perhaps not because they're mildly toxic and not edible. At least Hank might wanna collect them

item.dc:creator: bluecamera

item.title: I do a good job
item.description: My partner does a good job of making feel appreciated but I recently found out my hip is broken and I can’t stand or walk for a month to recover. My wife told me recently that she didn’t realize just how much I did around the house, until she had to do it all. Please no comments about how she’s not a good partner because she is, just nice to know I’m actually doing as much as I am trying
item.dc:creator: kidfromOKwiththetuckfromMB

item.title: "Fuck Russia, Slava Ukraini" -Canadians
item.description:
Why is some dude in Ontario posting a picture of a plane, saying Fuck Russia? Because FUCK EM. Current POV from hotel across the street.
Russia attempted a landing in Toronto in Feb 2022, well into the Ukraine war. Tower control bait+switched them, gave them clearance to land, but now refuses to give clearance for refueling OR takeoff. Plane has been grounded, stuck in that corner for over 2 years. Long enough that it can be seen from Google Maps satellite view. Not only that, there is talk about transferring the asset to Ukraine, since the gate fees of $0.77c/minute is pushing $1million. https://toronto.citynews.ca/2024/01/12/antonov-airplane-toronto-pearson-international-airport/ Fuck Russia, Slava Ukraini
item.dc:creator: Daxton

item.title: She took a pic of us

item.title: The "Indiana Jones" Trilogy (1981 to 1989) - Behind the Scenes
item.description:
The cloud tank used to create the special effects for the opening the Ark (as well as the clouds in the scene when Indy first enters the Well of Souls).
Ghostbusters - https://imgur.com/gallery/LsBvyll Doctor Who - https://imgur.com/gallery/JxXJqzd Stargate - https://imgur.com/gallery/nXYrraP TMNT - https://imgur.com/gallery/WzuWWxX Batman - https://imgur.com/gallery/FrMEXzL Star Trek TOS - https://imgur.com/gallery/4SPJxyX Star Trek (Search for Spock) - https://imgur.com/gallery/fTMuvU6 TNG - https://imgur.com/gallery/CMgsCIy DS9 - https://imgur.com/gallery/S8ISUlZ VOY - https://imgur.com/gallery/YDc2PD2 ENT - https://imgur.com/gallery/ov74iIE 09 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Odj24Cz Star Wars Ep1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/gkRgfe9 The Goonies - https://imgur.com/gallery/Ek3MpLl Xena - https://imgur.com/gallery/Hws7HQl The Mummy - https://imgur.com/gallery/GUrb6Oa Speed - https://imgur.com/gallery/TQ9uQuP Mary Poppins - https://imgur.com/gallery/f6WgNlR Twister - https://imgur.com/gallery/UPpv1o4 The Lion King - https://imgur.com/gallery/nAtmrFU Sesame Street - https://imgur.com/gallery/f3RafRD Wonder Woman - https://imgur.com/gallery/HIXhW9F Prince of Persia - https://imgur.com/gallery/yamtLub Dragonslayer - https://imgur.com/a/YSwNblp The Great Race - https://imgur.com/gallery/tO9DeWn Black Lagoon - https://imgur.com/gallery/EraNuoW Chip 'n Dale - https://imgur.com/gallery/L6uxizO Forrest Gump - https://imgur.com/gallery/l4ruaYp
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Lady death (OC)
item.description: If you're interested in seeing more of my stuff, you can check out my Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gryzlock_comics And if you're feeling extra generous and want to support a non-AI artist, I have a Ko-fi page: www.ko-fi.com/gryzlock Thanks a bunch! Hope you're having a great day!
item.dc:creator: gryzlock

item.title: Some bottom shelf memes I found in the doctor's office.
item.description:
I tested positive for covid and strep and I feel like an absolute dumpster fire both physically and emotionally.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Here's my #cutestcat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) Here's a dump of her lore: https://imgur.com/gallery/exk84wA (far less seizure inducing)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
